node.statement: MODEL M3 (Plateau width — phenomenological): Plateau at nu=p/q extends over range |nu(B)-p/q| < Delta/(hbar*omega_c) approximately. Width proportional to gap-to-disorder ratio. Disorder broadening Gamma ~ hbar/tau where tau from mobility: tau = m*mu_e/e. FULLY PHENOMENOLOGICAL — disorder is not computed from first principles. Our gap HIERARCHY (which fractions are visible) is ab initio; the widths are not. [P11-Girvin Sec 1.5; P10-Dykhne Sec II]
